api_contract.notes: Do NOT set modalities. Image data is in choices[0].message.images[0].image_url.url (base64 data URL). message.content is null. finish_reason=length means max_tokens was too low — increase and retry.

notes.summary: OpenRouter lists GPT-5 Image as text+image+file input to text+image output.
Preferred for NumberQuest final image assets based on local comparison against FLUX.2 Pro.

api_contract.notes: Do NOT set modalities. Image data is in choices[0].message.images[0].image_url.url (base64 data URL). message.content is null. finish_reason=length means max_tokens was too low — increase and retry. Response body ~2MB due to encrypted reasoning blob.

notes.summary: Verified 2026-06-21: max_tokens=1024 caused finish_reason=length with no image. max_tokens=8192 succeeded. Image returned in message.images[0], not message.content.

api_contract.notes: Use modalities: ["image"] and optional image_config for aspect_ratio/image_size. Do NOT set max_tokens. Image data is in choices[0].message.images[0].image_url.url (data URL or remote URL). seed is supported.

notes.summary: OpenRouter lists FLUX.2 Pro as text+image input to image output and supports seed.

api_contract.notes: Native PDF and file input: send as content type 'file' with url 'data:application/pdf;base64,...'. Use 32000+ max_tokens for full-document extraction. Best choice for PDF-to-text at $0.10/M input — 12x cheaper than GLM 5.2. finish_reason=length means max_tokens too low.

notes.summary: Verified 2026-06-21: selected over GLM 5.2 for 37-page IKEA kitchen PDF extraction. Native file modality support at $0.10/M vs $1.20/M.
Local OpenRouter GLM skill uses GLM 5.2 for long-context coding, repository analysis, and second-pass review.
